question: Has Boeing reported any materially important ongoing legal battles from FY2022?
answer: Yes, Boeing reported two materially important ongoing legal battles. On page 113, it discusses remaining pending lawsuits related to the 737 MAX accidents for which a range of loss cannot be reasonably estimated. It also describes an ongoing arbitration with Embraer, regarding a dispute over terminated joint venture agreements, which was expected to be complete in late 2023 or early 2024.
